# MaxLife Realty — llms.txt

> MaxLife Realty is a commercial real estate brokerage based in Orlando, Florida,
> serving Central Florida and the Space Coast. We specialize in commercial property
> sales, leasing, NNN (triple-net) investments, and land development.

## About

- **Company:** MaxLife Realty LLC
- **Founder:** Ryan Solberg — Licensed Florida Real Estate Broker (DBPR BK3354351) and Mortgage Loan Officer (NMLS 1784218)
- **Brokerage:** MortgageInc (NMLS 2028516)
- **Location:** Orlando & Space Coast, Florida
- **Service area:** Orange, Seminole, Osceola, Lake, Polk, and Brevard Counties
- **Phone:** (321) 586-2121 | Toll-Free: 855-SOLBERG (765-2374)
- **Email:** Ryan@MaxLifeRealty.com
- **Website:** https://maxlifedevelopment.com

## What We Do

MaxLife Realty helps investors, business owners, and developers buy, sell, lease,
and develop commercial real estate across Central Florida. Our core services:

- **Commercial real estate brokerage** — buyer and seller representation for
  office, retail, industrial, multifamily, mixed-use, and specialty properties
- **NNN investment properties** — triple-net leased assets with credit tenants
  for passive-income investors and 1031 exchange buyers
- **Land development** — site selection, entitlements, and project delivery for
  commercial and residential development
- **Mortgage lending** — commercial and residential financing through MortgageInc
- **Tenant representation** — office and retail space leasing for businesses

## Property Types We Cover

We provide expert guidance across 13 major commercial property categories and
over 130 subtypes:

- Retail (shopping centers, strip malls, single-tenant NNN, pad sites)
- Office (Class A/B/C, medical office, coworking, flex)
- Industrial (warehouse, distribution, manufacturing, flex, cold storage)
- Multifamily (garden-style, mid-rise, high-rise, student housing, affordable)
- Hospitality (hotels, motels, extended-stay, resorts)
- Land (raw land, entitled land, infill, agricultural conversion)
- Mixed-Use (vertical, horizontal, live-work, transit-oriented)
- Special Purpose (car washes, gas stations, churches, schools, marinas)
- Self Storage (climate-controlled, drive-up, boat/RV, multi-story)
- Mobile Home Parks (all-ages, 55+, RV parks)
- Senior Living (independent living, assisted living, memory care, CCRC)
- Businesses for Sale (franchises, owner-operator, turnkey operations)
- Notes & Loans (performing notes, non-performing notes, loan assumptions)

## Markets We Serve

- **Orlando** — Central Florida's largest metro, strong population and job growth
- **Brevard County** — Space Coast, driven by aerospace and defense
- **Lake County** — Rapidly growing suburban and rural commercial corridor
- **Central Florida** — Six-county investment property market

## Free Resources

### MaxLife Academy (20 free courses)
A complete commercial real estate education — from beginner to advanced:
https://maxlifedevelopment.com/academy

Topics covered: CRE fundamentals, financial analysis, pro formas, market analysis,
deal sourcing, due diligence, financing, negotiations, NNN investing, multifamily,
self-storage, retail/specialty, office/industrial, land development, syndication,
and tax strategy including 1031 exchanges.

### Investor Tools
- **Deal Analyzer** — underwrite any CRE deal with IRR, cash-on-cash, DSCR, and
  equity multiple: https://maxlifedevelopment.com/deal-analyzer
- **Seller Net Sheet** — estimate net proceeds from a property sale:
  https://maxlifedevelopment.com/net-sheets/seller
- **Buyer Estimate** — estimate total acquisition costs:
  https://maxlifedevelopment.com/net-sheets/buyer

### Market Intelligence
- **Quarterly Market Reports** — data-driven reports on Central Florida CRE:
  https://maxlifedevelopment.com/market-reports
- **Blog & Insights** — articles on Orlando CRE trends, investment strategies,
  and market updates: https://maxlifedevelopment.com/blog
- **Cap Rates by Submarket** — current cap rate data across Central Florida
  submarkets
